results.scenarioName: AI discovery — llms.txt and machine-readable resources
results.prompt: Check https://loisirs74.fr/llms.txt and use what it declares to list the machine-readable resources this site offers to agents, then fetch one of those resources and extract one true fact from it. Read-only task: never submit forms or make bookings.

judge.check: Followed a resource actually declared in llms.txt (e.g. a content/*.md file or the API index)
Extracted a fact that is true per the fetched resource

content.text: I'll fetch the `llms.txt` file to see what machine-readable resources the site declares.

input.prompt: List verbatim all machine-readable resources, URLs, API endpoints, feeds, or data files this llms.txt file declares for AI agents. Include the full content of the file.

content.content:
# Machine-Readable Resources Declared in Loisirs 74's llms.txt

## Discovery & Data Files

1. **Full Content File**
   - URL: `https://loisirs74.fr/llms-full.txt`
   - Description: Complete concatenated content covering all 397 leisure sites with facts, activities, and FAQs

2. **API Index (JSON)**
   - URL: `https://loisirs74.fr/api/lieux.json`
   - Purpose: Machine-readable index with slug, name, category, commune, GPS coordinates, and canonical URL for each site

3. **Sitemap Index (XML)**
   - URL: `https://loisirs74.fr/sitemap.xml`
   - Features: Standard XML sitemap with lastmod timestamps, hreflang language tags, and image entries

4. **AI Discovery Manifest**
   - URL: `https://loisirs74.fr/.well-known/ai-info.json`
   - Purpose: Manifest declaring all AI-related endpoints and resources

## Category Hub Resources (Markdown)

Ten category-specific pages organized by leisure type:
- Lacs & plages (31 sites)
- Cascades (17 sites)
- Bases de loisirs (33 sites)
- Points de vue (28 sites)
- Téléphériques & télécabines (8 sites)
- Châteaux (26 sites)
- Sentiers (40 sites)
- Voies vertes (5 sites)
- Musées (49 sites)
- Attractions & loisirs (160 sites)

Each accessible via pattern: `https://loisirs74.fr/content/[category-slug].md`

## Key Data Elements

The manifest emphasizes that each location record includes: GPS coordinates (with `geo_verified` flag), opening hours, pricing, accessibility information, and multiple language versions (French, English, German, Italian, Spanish, Dutch).

content.text: The `llms.txt` declares several machine-readable resources. Let me fetch one — the JSON API index — to extract a fact.

content.text:
Done. Here's what the site declares and what I extracted.

## Machine-readable resources declared in `https://loisirs74.fr/llms.txt`

For AI agents, the site advertises these machine-readable resources:

1. **`https://loisirs74.fr/llms-full.txt`** — full concatenated content (facts, activities, FAQs) for all leisure sites.
2. **`https://loisirs74.fr/api/lieux.json`** — JSON index of every location (slug, name, category, commune, GPS coordinates, canonical URL).
3. **`https://loisirs74.fr/sitemap.xml`** — XML sitemap with `lastmod` timestamps, hreflang tags, and image entries.
4. **`https://loisirs74.fr/.well-known/ai-info.json`** — AI discovery manifest listing all AI endpoints/resources.
5. **Category hub Markdown files** at `https://loisirs74.fr/content/[category-slug].md` — ten category pages (Lacs & plages, Cascades, Bases de loisirs, Points de vue, Téléphériques & télécabines, Châteaux, Sentiers, Voies vertes, Musées, Attractions & loisirs).

## Resource fetched + one true fact

I fetched the JSON API index (`/api/lieux.json`). One true fact extracted from it:

> **The Abbaye d'Aulps is located in the commune of Saint-Jean-d'Aulps (postal code 74430), at GPS coordinates 46.2419, 6.6498**, with canonical URL `https://loisirs74.fr/abbaye-d-aulps`.

The index contains **392 location entries** in total. This was a read-only fetch — no forms submitted and no bookings made.

entries.toolResultText:
# Machine-Readable Resources Declared in Loisirs 74's llms.txt

## Discovery & Data Files

1. **Full Content File**
   - URL: `https://loisirs74.fr/llms-full.txt`
   - Description: Complete concatenated content covering all 397 leisure sites with facts, activities, and FAQs

2. **API Index (JSON)**
   - URL: `https://loisirs74.fr/api/lieux.json`
   - Purpose: Machine-readable index with slug, name, category, commune, GPS coordinates, and canonical URL for each site

3. **Sitemap Index (XML)**
   - URL: `https://loisirs74.fr/sitemap.xml`
   - Features: Standard XML sitemap with lastmod timestamps, hreflang language tags, and image entries

4. **AI Discovery Manifest**
   - URL: `https://loisirs74.fr/.well-known/ai-info.json`
   - Purpose: Manifest declaring all AI-related endpoints and resources

## Category Hub Resources (Markdown)

Ten category-specific pages organized by leisure type:
- Lacs & plages (31 sites)
- Cascades (17 sites)
- Bases de loisirs (33 sites)
- Points de vue (28 sites)
- Téléphériques & télécabines (8 sites)
- Châteaux (26 sites)
- Sentiers (40 sites)
- Voies vertes (5 sites)
- Musées (49 sites)
- Attractions & loisirs (160 sites)

Each accessible via pattern: `https://loisirs74.fr/content/[category-slug].md`

## Key Data Elements

The manifest emphasizes that each location record includes: GPS coordinates (with `geo_verified` flag), opening hours, pricing, accessibility information, and multiple language versions (French, English, German, Italian, Spanish, Dutch).

## Machine-readable resources declared in `https://loisirs74.fr/llms.txt`

For AI agents, the site advertises these machine-readable resources:

1. **`https://loisirs74.fr/llms-full.txt`** — full concatenated content (facts, activities, FAQs) for all leisure sites.
2. **`https://loisirs74.fr/api/lieux.json`** — JSON index of every location (slug, name, category, commune, GPS coordinates, canonical URL).

## Resource fetched + one true fact

I fetched the JSON API index (`/api/lieux.json`). One true fact extracted from it:

> **The Abbaye d'Aulps is located in the commune of Saint-Jean-d'Aulps (postal code 74430), at GPS coordinates 46.2419, 6.6498**, with canonical URL `https://loisirs74.fr/abbaye-d-aulps`.

results.scenarioName: Comparison — two Lac d'Annecy beaches for small children
results.prompt: Using https://loisirs74.fr, compare two beaches on Lac d'Annecy on entry price and lifeguard supervision, then recommend one of the two for a family with small children and say why. Read-only task: browse and read pages only, never submit forms or make bookings.

judge.check: Compared two real beach pages that exist on loisirs74.fr
Price and lifeguard-supervision facts match the pages
Gave a reasoned recommendation grounded in those facts

input.prompt: List all beaches (plages) on Lac d'Annecy mentioned on this page, with links to their individual pages. I need beaches that have information about entry price and lifeguard supervision (baignade surveillée).

content.content:
# Lac d'Annecy Beaches with Lifeguard Supervision

Based on the page content, here are the beaches on Lac d'Annecy that mention supervised swimming (baignade surveillée):

1. **Plage de Saint-Jorioz**
   - Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz
   - Description: "La seule grande plage de sable naturel du lac d'Annecy"
   - Price: Free
   - Features: Natural sand, shaded lawns, diving board, accessible facilities

2. **Plage des Marquisats**
   - Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-des-marquisats
   - Description: "Plage engazonnée de 200 mètres de long...surveillée en été"
   - Price: Free
   - Features: Monitored in summer, PMR equipment, 10-minute walk from old town

**Note:** Plage d'Albigny is listed as free but does not explicitly mention lifeguard supervision in its description.

input.prompt: What is the entry price (tarif d'entrée) and lifeguard supervision (baignade surveillée / surveillance) situation? Also list amenities relevant to families with small children (shallow water, sand, shade, facilities, first aid).

What is the entry price (tarif d'entrée) and lifeguard supervision (baignade surveillée / surveillance) situation? Also list amenities relevant to families with small children (shallow water, sand, shade, facilities, first aid).

content.content:
# Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Entry Prices & Family Amenities

## Entry Prices & Lifeguard Supervision

**July-August (High Season):**
- Adults (18+): €2.60
- Children (10-17 years): €1.00
- Under 10: Free
- After 4:30 PM: €1.00 (all ages)
- Season pass: €22.00

"Accès payant et surveillé du 1er juillet au 31 août de 9h30 à 17h30" with lifeguards on duty. Outside this period, access is free and unsupervised.

## Family-Friendly Amenities

**Water & Sand:**
- "La seule grande plage de sable naturel du lac d'Annecy" (the only large natural sand beach on Lake Annecy)
- Gentle slope suitable for families
- Shallow wading pool for young children

**Shade & Relaxation:**
- "Vastes pelouses ombragées" (extensive shaded lawns) with mature trees

**Facilities:**
- Accessible restrooms
- Restaurant and snack bar on-site
- Free parking in shaded lot
- Accessible for strollers/pushchairs

**Safety:**
- Lifeguard supervision during summer months
- 3-level diving platform (5 meters) for older children

content.content:
# Plage des Marquisats: Entry Price & Family Amenities

## Entry Price
"Gratuit" (Free). This is one of only two entirely free beaches in Annecy.

## Lifeguard Supervision
"Surveillée en juillet-août (11h–19h)" - Lifeguards are present from early summer vacation through August 31st, 11am-7pm daily.

## Family-Friendly Amenities

**Water Access:**
- Gradual entry with sandy bank followed by pebbly bottom
- Average summer temperature: 23°C
- Shallow approach ideal for young children

**Shade & Comfort:**
- "200 mètres de long" of grassy area with "nombreux arbres" (many trees) providing natural shade
- Picnic area on the lawn

**Facilities:**
- Free showers and toilets
- Accessible changing facilities
- Summer snack bar
- Amphibious wheelchairs and lift equipment (inclusive beach features)

**Additional Benefits:**
- Only 10 minutes walk from old town
- Flat, secure paths for strollers/PMR access
- Adjacent nautical clubs for varied activities
- Lower crowds outside July-August peak season

# Plage des Marquisats: Entry Price & Family Amenities

## Entry Price
"Gratuit" (Free). This is one of only two entirely free beaches in Annecy.

## Lifeguard Supervision
"Surveillée en juillet-août (11h–19h)" - Lifeguards are present from early summer vacation through August 31st, 11am-7pm daily.

## Family-Friendly Amenities

**Water Access:**
- Gradual entry with sandy bank followed by pebbly bottom
- Average summer temperature: 23°C
- Shallow approach ideal for young children

**Shade & Comfort:**
- "200 mètres de long" of grassy area with "nombreux arbres" (many trees) providing natural shade
- Picnic area on the lawn

**Facilities:**
- Free showers and toilets
- Accessible changing facilities
- Summer snack bar
- Amphibious wheelchairs and lift equipment (inclusive beach features)

**Additional Benefits:**
- Only 10 minutes walk from old town
- Flat, secure paths for strollers/PMR access
- Adjacent nautical clubs for varied activities
- Lower crowds outside July-August peak season

content.text:
Here's the comparison, based on the two supervised Lac d'Annecy beaches listed on loisirs74.fr.

## Comparison

| | **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** | **Plage des Marquisats** |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry price (Jul–Aug)** | Paid: adults €2.60, kids 10–17 €1.00, **under 10 free**; €1 after 4:30pm; season pass €22 | **Free** |
| **Off-season price** | Free (but unsupervised) | Free |
| **Lifeguard supervision** | 1 Jul–31 Aug, **9:30–17:30** | Jul–Aug, **11:00–19:00** |
| **Shore surface** | Natural sand (only large sand beach on the lake), gentle slope | Sandy entry then **pebbly bottom** |
| **For small children** | Shallow wading pool for young kids, gentle gradient | Shallow gradual approach, ~23°C water |
| **Shade & facilities** | Large shaded lawns, accessible toilets, restaurant/snack, free shaded parking, stroller-friendly | Grassy shaded lawns, free showers/toilets, snack bar, stroller/PMR paths, 10 min from old town |

## Recommendation: **Plage de Saint-Jorioz**

For a family with small children, I'd recommend Saint-Jorioz, mainly for two reasons that matter most at that age:

- **Sand + a dedicated shallow wading pool.** It's the only large natural-sand beach on the lake, with a gentle slope and a shallow paddling area specifically for young children. Marquisats starts sandy but turns to a **pebbly bottom**, which is harder on small bare feet and less pleasant for toddlers to play in.
- **Cost is effectively minimal.** Although it's a paid beach, **children under 10 are free**, so a family with small kids pays only €2.60 per adult — a small amount for the sand and the enclosed wading area.

**The honest trade-offs**, in case they change your mind:
- **Budget/hours:** Marquisats is completely free and has longer supervision (11:00–19:00 vs. 9:30–17:30), so it's the better pick if you plan late-afternoon/early-evening swims or want zero cost.
- **Supervision start time:** Saint-Jorioz's lifeguards start earlier (9:30), which suits families arriving in the morning — a common rhythm with young children.

Net: if the priority is a safe, sandy, toddler-friendly swim, **Saint-Jorioz** is the better fit; choose **Marquisats** if free entry and longer evening supervision outweigh the pebble bottom.

*(Read-only task — I only browsed and read the pages; no forms submitted or bookings made. Note: the site's per-page price/hours details should be double-checked on-site before you go, as seasonal figures can change.)*

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01YMZ64fY54qdJYyiqJnjxfP","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Here's the comparison, based on the two supervised Lac d'Annecy beaches listed on loisirs74.fr.

## Comparison

| | **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** | **Plage des Marquisats** |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry price (Jul–Aug)** | Paid: adults €2.60, kids 10–17 €1.00, **under 10 free**; €1 after 4:30pm; season pass €22 | **Free** |
| **Off-season price** | Free (but unsupervised) | Free |
| **Lifeguard supervision** | 1 Jul–31 Aug, **9:30–17:30** | Jul–Aug, **11:00–19:00** |
| **Shore surface** | Natural sand (only large sand beach on the lake), gentle slope | Sandy entry then **pebbly bottom** |
| **For small children** | Shallow wading pool for young kids, gentle gradient | Shallow gradual approach, ~23°C water |
| **Shade & facilities** | Large shaded lawns, accessible toilets, restaurant/snack, free shaded parking, stroller-friendly | Grassy shaded lawns, free showers/toilets, snack bar, stroller/PMR paths, 10 min from old town |

## Recommendation: **Plage de Saint-Jorioz**

For a family with small children, I'd recommend Saint-Jorioz, mainly for two reasons that matter most at that age:

- **Sand + a dedicated shallow wading pool.** It's the only large natural-sand beach on the lake, with a gentle slope and a shallow paddling area specifically for young children. entries.toolResultText:
# Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Entry Prices & Family Amenities

## Entry Prices & Lifeguard Supervision

**July-August (High Season):**
- Adults (18+): €2.60
- Children (10-17 years): €1.00
- Under 10: Free
- After 4:30 PM: €1.00 (all ages)
- Season pass: €22.00

"Accès payant et surveillé du 1er juillet au 31 août de 9h30 à 17h30" with lifeguards on duty. Outside this period, access is free and unsupervised.

## Family-Friendly Amenities

**Water & Sand:**
- "La seule grande plage de sable naturel du lac d'Annecy" (the only large natural sand beach on Lake Annecy)
- Gentle slope suitable for families
- Shallow wading pool for young children

**Shade & Relaxation:**
- "Vastes pelouses ombragées" (extensive shaded lawns) with mature trees

**Facilities:**
- Accessible restrooms
- Restaurant and snack bar on-site
- Free parking in shaded lot
- Accessible for strollers/pushchairs

**Safety:**
- Lifeguard supervision during summer months
- 3-level diving platform (5 meters) for older children

# Plage des Marquisats: Entry Price & Family Amenities

## Entry Price
"Gratuit" (Free). This is one of only two entirely free beaches in Annecy.

## Lifeguard Supervision
"Surveillée en juillet-août (11h–19h)" - Lifeguards are present from early summer vacation through August 31st, 11am-7pm daily.

## Family-Friendly Amenities

**Water Access:**
- Gradual entry with sandy bank followed by pebbly bottom
- Average summer temperature: 23°C
- Shallow approach ideal for young children

**Shade & Comfort:**
- "200 mètres de long" of grassy area with "nombreux arbres" (many trees) providing natural shade
- Picnic area on the lawn

**Facilities:**
- Free showers and toilets
- Accessible changing facilities
- Summer snack bar
- Amphibious wheelchairs and lift equipment (inclusive beach features)

**Additional Benefits:**
- Only 10 minutes walk from old town
- Flat, secure paths for strollers/PMR access
- Adjacent nautical clubs for varied activities
- Lower crowds outside July-August peak season

entries.text:
Here's the comparison, based on the two supervised Lac d'Annecy beaches listed on loisirs74.fr.

## Comparison

| | **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** | **Plage des Marquisats** |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry price (Jul–Aug)** | Paid: adults €2.60, kids 10–17 €1.00, **under 10 free**; €1 after 4:30pm; season pass €22 | **Free** |
| **Off-season price** | Free (but unsupervised) | Free |
| **Lifeguard supervision** | 1 Jul–31 Aug, **9:30–17:30** | Jul–Aug, **11:00–19:00** |
| **Shore surface** | Natural sand (only large sand beach on the lake), gentle slope | Sandy entry then **pebbly bottom** |
| **For small children** | Shallow wading pool for young kids, gentle gradient | Shallow gradual approach, ~23°C water |
| **Shade & facilities** | Large shaded lawns, accessible toilets, restaurant/snack, free shaded parking, stroller-friendly | Grassy shaded lawns, free showers/toilets, snack bar, stroller/PMR paths, 10 min from old town |

## Recommendation: **Plage de Saint-Jorioz**

For a family with small children, I'd recommend Saint-Jorioz, mainly for two reasons that matter most at that age:

- **Sand + a dedicated shallow wading pool.** It's the only large natural-sand beach on the lake, with a gentle slope and a shallow paddling area specifically for young children. Marquisats starts sandy but turns to a **pebbly bottom**, which is harder on small bare feet and less pleasant for toddlers to play in.
- **Cost is effectively minimal.** Although it's a paid beach, **children under 10 are free**, so a family with small kids pays only €2.60 per adult — a small amount for the sand and the enclosed wading area.

**The honest trade-offs**, in case they change your mind:
- **Budget/hours:** Marquisats is completely free and has longer supervision (11:00–19:00 vs. 9:30–17:30), so it's the better pick if you plan late-afternoon/early-evening swims or want zero cost.
- **Supervision start time:** Saint-Jorioz's lifeguards start earlier (9:30), which suits families arriving in the morning — a common rhythm with young children.

Net: if the priority is a safe, sandy, toddler-friendly swim, **Saint-Jorioz** is the better fit; choose **Marquisats** if free entry and longer evening supervision outweigh the pebble bottom.

*(Read-only task — I only browsed and read the pages; no forms submitted or bookings made. Note: the site's per-page price/hours details should be double-checked on-site before you go, as seasonal figures can change.)*

Here's what I found about the **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** on loisirs74.fr:

## Overview
The Plage de Saint-Jorioz is the only large natural beach on Lac d'Annecy. Located on the western shore of the lake with views of the Dents de Lanfon and la Tournette, it extends over about 2,200 m² and combines a fine sandy beach (about 100 meters long) with expansive shaded lawns.

## Opening Hours & Access
The municipal beach is open year-round with a mix of free and paid access:
- Free access from January 1 to June 30 and from September 1 to December 31.
- Paid access with lifeguards from July 1 to August 31, from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM. Closed from 7:00 to 9:30 AM for cleaning in July–August.

## Pricing (Summer, July–August)
Adult (18 and older): €2.60 · Child 10–17: €1 · Under 10: free · Entry after 4:30 PM: €1 · Season pass (unlimited July–August): €22 · Chip card support (processing fee): €2. Off-season (Sept.–June): free.

## Tickets
Online ticketing is available at saint-jorioz.fr (E-Shop) for chip cards, packs of 10–20, or single tickets (QR code by email). Purchase is also possible at the beach cash desks or at the town hall.

## Labels & Facilities
- Awarded the Blue Flag label since 2010, the beach guarantees high environmental standards: daily cleaning during the season, sand renewal every four years, waste management, and public awareness.
- It has also received the "Tourisme et Handicap" label thanks to special facilities: water access ramps and free provision of two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) in July–August.

## Practical Info
- **Dogs:** Dogs are prohibited year-round at the Plage de Saint-Jorioz, even on a leash, in accordance with the Blue Flag label.
- **Parking:** There is a large free shaded parking lot in front of the entrance. In summer it is often full: arrive before 11:00 AM or use the alternate parking areas (marina, sports complex).

Note that this information was confirmed on the official website on May 14, 2026 — subject to seasonal changes. For the most current details, it's best to check the official Saint-Jorioz municipal website before visiting.

content.content:
# Three Facts from Plage de Saint-Jorioz

**(1) Entry Price / Tarif d'entrée:**
"Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit"
The beach is free from September to June.

**(2) Opening Hours / Horaires d'ouverture:**
"1er juillet – 31 août : accès payant de 9h30 à 17h30" with closure from 7–9:30 AM for cleaning. Outside these months, access is free daily throughout the year.

**(3) Wheelchair Accessibility / Accessibilité PMR:**
"Rampe d'accès à l'eau et deux fauteuils amphibies (Tiralo et Hippocampe) mis gratuitement à disposition en juillet-août." The beach holds the Tourisme et Handicap label and offers level entry, adapted restrooms, and designated parking.

## Overview
The Plage de Saint-Jorioz is the only large natural beach on Lac d'Annecy. Located on the western shore of the lake with views of the Dents de Lanfon and la Tournette, it extends over about 2,200 m² and combines a fine sandy beach (about 100 meters long) with expansive shaded lawns.

## Opening Hours & Access
The municipal beach is open year-round with a mix of free and paid access:
- Free access from January 1 to June 30 and from September 1 to December 31.
- Paid access with lifeguards from July 1 to August 31, from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM. Closed from 7:00 to 9:30 AM for cleaning in July–August.

## Pricing (Summer, July–August)
Adult (18 and older): €2.60 · Child 10–17: €1 · Under 10: free · Entry after 4:30 PM: €1 · Season pass (unlimited July–August): €22 · Chip card support (processing fee): €2. Off-season (Sept.–June): free.

## Tickets
Online ticketing is available at saint-jorioz.fr (E-Shop) for chip cards, packs of 10–20, or single tickets (QR code by email). Purchase is also possible at the beach cash desks or at the town hall.

- Awarded the Blue Flag label since 2010, the beach guarantees high environmental standards: daily cleaning during the season, sand renewal every four years, waste management, and public awareness.
- It has also received the "Tourisme et Handicap" label thanks to special facilities: water access ramps and free provision of two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) in July–August.

## Practical Info
- **Dogs:** Dogs are prohibited year-round at the Plage de Saint-Jorioz, even on a leash, in accordance with the Blue Flag label.

Here's what I found about the **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** on loisirs74.fr:

## Overview
The Plage de Saint-Jorioz is the only large natural beach on Lac d'Annecy. Located on the western shore of the lake with views of the Dents de Lanfon and la Tournette, it extends over about 2,200 m² and combines a fine sandy beach (about 100 meters long) with expansive shaded lawns.

## Opening Hours & Access
The municipal beach is open year-round with a mix of free and paid access:
- Free access from January 1 to June 30 and from September 1 to December 31.
- Paid access with lifeguards from July 1 to August 31, from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM. Closed from 7:00 to 9:30 AM for cleaning in July–August.

## Pricing (Summer, July–August)
Adult (18 and older): €2.60 · Child 10–17: €1 · Under 10: free · Entry after 4:30 PM: €1 · Season pass (unlimited July–August): €22 · Chip card support (processing fee): €2. Off-season (Sept.–June): free.

## Tickets
Online ticketing is available at saint-jorioz.fr (E-Shop) for chip cards, packs of 10–20, or single tickets (QR code by email). Purchase is also possible at the beach cash desks or at the town hall.

## Labels & Facilities
- Awarded the Blue Flag label since 2010, the beach guarantees high environmental standards: daily cleaning during the season, sand renewal every four years, waste management, and public awareness.
- It has also received the "Tourisme et Handicap" label thanks to special facilities: water access ramps and free provision of two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) in July–August.

## Practical Info
- **Dogs:** Dogs are prohibited year-round at the Plage de Saint-Jorioz, even on a leash, in accordance with the Blue Flag label.
- **Parking:** There is a large free shaded parking lot in front of the entrance. In summer it is often full: arrive before 11:00 AM or use the alternate parking areas (marina, sports complex).

Note that this information was confirmed on the official website on May 14, 2026 — subject to seasonal changes. For the most current details, it's best to check the official Saint-Jorioz municipal website before visiting.

"Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit"
The beach is free from September to June.

**(2) Opening Hours / Horaires d'ouverture:**
"1er juillet – 31 août : accès payant de 9h30 à 17h30" with closure from 7–9:30 AM for cleaning. Outside these months, access is free daily throughout the year.

**(3) Wheelchair Accessibility / Accessibilité PMR:**
"Rampe d'accès à l'eau et deux fauteuils amphibies (Tiralo et Hippocampe) mis gratuitement à disposition en juillet-août." The beach holds the Tourisme et Handicap label and offers level entry, adapted restrooms, and designated parking.

[TOOL_RESULT]
  Result: # Three Facts from Plage de Saint-Jorioz

**(1) Entry Price / Tarif d'entrée:**
"Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit"
The beach is free from September to June.

**(2) Opening Hours / Horaires d'ouverture:**
"1er juillet – 31 août : accès payant de 9h30 à 17h30" with closure from 7–9:30 AM for cleaning. Outside these months, access is free daily throughout the year.

**(3) Wheelchair Accessibility / Accessibilité PMR:**
"Rampe d'accès à l'eau et deux fauteuils amphibies (Tiralo et Hippocampe) mis gratuitement à disposition en juillet-août." The beach holds the Tourisme et Handicap label and offers level entry, adapted restrooms, and designated parking.

[ASSISTANT] Here are the three facts for **Plage de Saint-Jorioz**, from [loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz):

- **Entry price:** Paid access only in high season (1 July–31 August): Adult (18+) €2.60 · Child 10–17 €1 · Under 10 free · entry after 4:30 PM €1 · season pass €22. Free the rest of the year (September–June).

- **Opening hours:** 1 July–31 August, paid supervised access 9:30 AM–5:30 PM (closed 7:00–9:30 AM for cleaning). Outside those months, free access daily year-round.

- **Wheelchair accessibility:** Holds the "Tourisme et Handicap" label — water-access ramp and two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) provided free of charge in July–August, plus adapted restrooms and designated parking.

I only browsed and read the pages; no forms were submitted or bookings made.

Note: the site records this info as confirmed on 14 May 2026 and subject to seasonal change, so verify against the official Saint-Jorioz municipal site before a visit.

Web search results for query: "loisirs74.fr fiche lieu"

Links: [{"title":"Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux — Baignade biologique en Haute-Savoie | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/baignade-biotope-combloux"},{"title":"Les 4 Nemours — Cinéma à Annecy, Haute-Savoie | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/cinema-les-4-nemours-annecy"},{"title":"Plage de Saint-Jorioz · Tarifs et horaires (74)","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz"},{"title":"Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/telecabine-panoramic-mont-blanc"},{"title":"Yaute Canyon — Canyoning Aravis & Annecy | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/canyoning-yaute-canyon"},{"title":"Muséum des Papillons et Insectes","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/museum-des-papillons-et-insectes-faverges"},{"title":"Plage de Talloires · GRATUIT · 2026 - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/plage-de-talloires"},{"title":"Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy · 2026 - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/croisiere-bateaux-annecy-annecy"},{"title":"Aquariaz · Tarifs et horaires officiels (Avoriaz) - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/aquariaz"},{"title":"Salle de bloc d'escalade Annecy - Ablok Argonay - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/escalade-ablok-argonay"}]

Voici les résultats de la recherche pour **loisirs74.fr fiche lieu**. Loisirs 74 est un site répertoriant des activités et lieux de loisirs en Haute-Savoie (74), avec des fiches détaillées incluant tarifs, horaires, accès et informations pratiques. Voici un aperçu des principales fiches trouvées :

## Baignade & plages

**Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux** — Le premier site de baignade biologique ouvert au public en France, inauguré en 2002 et entièrement réhabilité en 2022. Avec un bassin de 2 900 m³, l'eau y est filtrée naturellement par plus de 10 000 plantes aquatiques réparties dans quatre bassins interconnectés, sans aucun produit chimique.

**Plage de Saint-Jorioz** — Grande plage de sable au bord du lac d'Annecy face aux Dents de Lanfon. Payante juillet-août (2,60 €), gratuite le reste de l'année. Pavillon Bleu.

## Remontées mécaniques

**Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc** — Télécabine 4 places en pulsé reliant le sommet de l'Aiguille du Midi à la pointe Helbronner en 30 minutes, au-dessus du glacier du Géant, à la frontière France-Italie. À noter : un passeport ou une carte nationale d'identité en cours de validité est obligatoire, contrôlé à la pointe Helbronner.

## Sports & activités

**Yaute Canyon** — Un bureau de moniteurs spécialisé dans le canyoning autour d'Annecy et dans le massif des Aravis. L'équipe encadre des descentes dans les canyons les plus emblématiques de Haute-Savoie : Angon, Montmin, Grand Nant, Bionnassay, Vésubie ou encore les canyons des Aravis.

## Culture & musées

**Les 4 Nemours (Annecy)** — Cinéma d'art et d'essai classé en plein centre d'Annecy : 4 salles dédiées aux films d'auteur, documentaires, classiques restaurés et jeune public en VO.

**Muséum des Papillons et Insectes (Faverges)** — Il présente une collection exceptionnelle de plus de 5 000 papillons et insectes des 5 continents. C'est le seul muséum de ce type en Savoie et Haute-Savoie, et l'un des trois seulement en France.

Le site propose également des fiches en néerlandais (préfixe `/nl/`), comme la **Plage de Talloires**, la **Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy**, **Aquariaz** (parc aquatique à Avoriaz) et **Ablok Argonay** (salle d'escalade).

Souhaitez-vous que je recherche la fiche d'un lieu ou d'une activité spécifique ?

Voici les résultats de la recherche pour **loisirs74.fr fiche lieu**. Loisirs 74 est un site répertoriant des activités et lieux de loisirs en Haute-Savoie (74), avec des fiches détaillées incluant tarifs, horaires, accès et informations pratiques. Voici un aperçu des principales fiches trouvées :

## Baignade & plages

**Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux** — Le premier site de baignade biologique ouvert au public en France, inauguré en 2002 et entièrement réhabilité en 2022. Avec un bassin de 2 900 m³, l'eau y est filtrée naturellement par plus de 10 000 plantes aquatiques réparties dans quatre bassins interconnectés, sans aucun produit chimique.

**Plage de Saint-Jorioz** — Grande plage de sable au bord du lac d'Annecy face aux Dents de Lanfon. Payante juillet-août (2,60 €), gratuite le reste de l'année. Pavillon Bleu.

## Remontées mécaniques

**Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc** — Télécabine 4 places en pulsé reliant le sommet de l'Aiguille du Midi à la pointe Helbronner en 30 minutes, au-dessus du glacier du Géant, à la frontière France-Italie. À noter : un passeport ou une carte nationale d'identité en cours de validité est obligatoire, contrôlé à la pointe Helbronner.

## Sports & activités

**Yaute Canyon** — Un bureau de moniteurs spécialisé dans le canyoning autour d'Annecy et dans le massif des Aravis. L'équipe encadre des descentes dans les canyons les plus emblématiques de Haute-Savoie : Angon, Montmin, Grand Nant, Bionnassay, Vésubie ou encore les canyons des Aravis.

## Culture & musées

**Les 4 Nemours (Annecy)** — Cinéma d'art et d'essai classé en plein centre d'Annecy : 4 salles dédiées aux films d'auteur, documentaires, classiques restaurés et jeune public en VO.

**Muséum des Papillons et Insectes (Faverges)** — Il présente une collection exceptionnelle de plus de 5 000 papillons et insectes des 5 continents. C'est le seul muséum de ce type en Savoie et Haute-Savoie, et l'un des trois seulement en France.

Le site propose également des fiches en néerlandais (préfixe `/nl/`), comme la **Plage de Talloires**, la **Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy**, **Aquariaz** (parc aquatique à Avoriaz) et **Ablok Argonay** (salle d'escalade).

Loisirs 74 est un site répertoriant des activités et lieux de loisirs en Haute-Savoie (74), avec des fiches détaillées incluant tarifs, horaires, accès et informations pratiques. Voici un aperçu des principales fiches trouvées :

## Baignade & plages

**Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux** — Le premier site de baignade biologique ouvert au public en France, inauguré en 2002 et entièrement réhabilité en 2022. Avec un bassin de 2 900 m³, l'eau y est filtrée naturellement par plus de 10 000 plantes aquatiques réparties dans quatre bassins interconnectés, sans aucun produit chimique.

**Plage de Saint-Jorioz** — Grande plage de sable au bord du lac d'Annecy face aux Dents de Lanfon. Payante juillet-août (2,60 €), gratuite le reste de l'année. Pavillon Bleu.

## Remontées mécaniques

**Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc** — Télécabine 4 places en pulsé reliant le sommet de l'Aiguille du Midi à la pointe Helbronner en 30 minutes, au-dessus du glacier du Géant, à la frontière France-Italie. À noter : un passeport ou une carte nationale d'identité en cours de validité est obligatoire, contrôlé à la pointe Helbronner.

## Sports & activités

**Yaute Canyon** — Un bureau de moniteurs spécialisé dans le canyoning autour d'Annecy et dans le massif des Aravis. L'équipe encadre des descentes dans les canyons les plus emblématiques de Haute-Savoie : Angon, Montmin, Grand Nant, Bionnassay, Vésubie ou encore les canyons des Aravis.

## Culture & musées

**Les 4 Nemours (Annecy)** — Cinéma d'art et d'essai classé en plein centre d'Annecy : 4 salles dédiées aux films d'auteur, documentaires, classiques restaurés et jeune public en VO.

**Muséum des Papillons et Insectes (Faverges)** — Il présente une collection exceptionnelle de plus de 5 000 papillons et insectes des 5 continents. C'est le seul muséum de ce type en Savoie et Haute-Savoie, et l'un des trois seulement en France.

Le site propose également des fiches en néerlandais (préfixe `/nl/`), comme la **Plage de Talloires**, la **Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy**, **Aquariaz** (parc aquatique à Avoriaz) et **Ablok Argonay** (salle d'escalade).

input.prompt: List the main categories, navigation links, and any indoor activities near Annecy. What sections and URLs are available for indoor/rainy-day family activities?

content.content:
# Main Categories & Navigation

The site organizes content into **15 activity families**:

**Nature & Outdoor:** Lacs & plages, Bases de loisirs, Cascades & gorges, Points de vue & cols, Sentiers & randonnées, Voies vertes & vélo, Télécabines & trains

**Heritage & Culture:** Châteaux, forts & abbayes, Musées

**Sport & Recreation:** Baignade & nautisme, Sensations & plein air, Sport & jeux, Parcs, jardins & familles, Sorties & détente

# Indoor/Rainy-Day Activities Near Annecy

**Key URLs for sheltered family options:**

- `/baignade-nautisme/` — Aquatic centers including "centre aquatique couvert" facilities
- `/sport-jeux/` — Features "Le Bowl Bowling Annecy" (16 lanes), indoor skating rink, and climbing gyms
- `/sorties-detente/` — Spas, thermals, cinema (Pathé Annecy), and pottery workshops
- `/musees/` — "Musée-Château d'Annecy" and "Fonderie Paccard — Musée de la Cloche"
- `/chateaux/` — Historical castle visits

**Direct Annecy attractions:** Casino Impérial Palace, Atome Climbing, Climb Up Annecy, and covered aquatic centers provide "loisirs couverts" (sheltered activities) regardless of weather.

**Nature & Outdoor:** Lacs & plages, Bases de loisirs, Cascades & gorges, Points de vue & cols, Sentiers & randonnées, Voies vertes & vélo, Télécabines & trains

**Heritage & Culture:** Châteaux, forts & abbayes, Musées

**Sport & Recreation:** Baignade & nautisme, Sensations & plein air, Sport & jeux, Parcs, jardins & familles, Sorties & détente

# Indoor/Rainy-Day Activities Near Annecy

**Key URLs for sheltered family options:**

- `/baignade-nautisme/` — Aquatic centers including "centre aquatique couvert" facilities
- `/sport-jeux/` — Features "Le Bowl Bowling Annecy" (16 lanes), indoor skating rink, and climbing gyms
- `/sorties-detente/` — Spas, thermals, cinema (Pathé Annecy), and pottery workshops
- `/musees/` — "Musée-Château d'Annecy" and "Fonderie Paccard — Musée de la Cloche"
- `/chateaux/` — Historical castle visits

**Direct Annecy attractions:** Casino Impérial Palace, Atome Climbing, Climb Up Annecy, and covered aquatic centers provide "loisirs couverts" (sheltered activities) regardless of weather.

# Museums in or Near Annecy

## 1. **La Turbine Sciences**
- **Location:** Cran-Gevrier (Annecy)
- **Description:** Interactive science center offering hands-on exhibits, workshops, and events
- **Tickets:** Adults €5.50, Under 18 €3.00
- **URL:** https://loisirs74.fr/la-turbine-sciences-cran-gevrier

## 2. **Musée du Cinéma d'Animation**
- **Location:** Annecy (Haras d'Annecy)
- **Description:** New animation film museum opening June 19, 2026, featuring a "France Museum" collection, 450m² permanent exhibition, and 332-seat cinema
- **Tickets:** (Pricing not yet available)
- **URL:** https://loisirs74.fr/musee-cinema-animation-annecy

## 3. **Musée-Château d'Annecy**
- **Location:** Annecy (old town)
- **Description:** Medieval castle on rocky outcrop housing alpine art museum, lakeside archaeology exhibits, and Alpine Lakes Observatory
- **Tickets:** €6.50–€7.00 (full price)
- **URL:** https://loisirs74.fr/musee-chateau-annecy

## 4. **Palais de l'Île**
- **Location:** Annecy (historic center)
- **Description:** Medieval prison-tribunal on rocky island, symbol since the 12th century; hosts exhibitions
- **Tickets:** €4.00–€5.00 (full price); combined ticket with château €8.00–€9.00
- **URL:** https://loisirs74.fr/palais-de-l-ile-annecy

content.content:
# La Turbine Sciences — Pricing, Hours & Activities

## Ticket Pricing
- **Adult:** "5,50 €"
- **Children under 18 & reduced:** "3 €"
- **Under 6 years:** Free
- **Group visits:** "60 €" per session, or "100 € pour 2 visites/jour"

## Opening Hours
"Mar-dim 14h-18h · fermé les jours fériés" (Tuesday–Sunday, 2–6 PM; closed Mondays and holidays). Group visits available Tuesday–Friday at 9 or 10:30 AM by reservation.

## Address
"Place Chorus / 3 rue des Tisserands, 74960 Annecy (Cran-Gevrier)"

## Activities for Families
The center offers:
- Interactive exhibitions featuring manipulative displays on climate, energy, and science topics
- A digital planetarium with immersive shows (ages 6+)
- Hands-on workshops during school holidays
- Scientific lectures and outdoor nature excursions
- "Gratuit pour les moins de 6 ans" (free entry for under-6s makes it budget-friendly)

Plan to spend 1–2 hours, or a half-day including planetarium and workshops. The facility is fully accessible for people with reduced mobility.

content.content:
# Le Bowl Bowling Annecy - Key Details

**Pricing:**
- Adult: €8 per game
- Child: €6 per game
- Family packages available for evening outings
- Shoe rental pricing: Not specified

**Address:**
"9 boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy"

**Opening Hours:**
- Monday-Thursday: 2 PM–1 AM
- Friday-Saturday: 2 PM–4 AM
- Sunday: 2 PM–midnight

**Family Details:**
- 16 bowling lanes
- Integrated restaurant/brasserie (open lunch and dinner)
- Nightclub (Friday-Saturday, 11 PM–4 AM)
- Children's birthday packages available (1 hour + beverages)
- Sunday tournament with on-site registration
- Free parking on-site
- Partially wheelchair accessible (ground floor entry, adapted parking, accessible restrooms not available)
- No animals permitted

**Contact:** +33 (0)4 50 22 19 06 or [lac-annecy.com](https://www.lac-annecy.com/)

content.content:
# Bam Freesports Annecy Pricing & Info

## Pricing
"Session 1 h ~12-16 €" plus mandatory anti-slip socks at approximately 3€ (reusable). Duo packages, subscriptions, and group rates are available. Children's birthday party packages include one hour of jumping plus a private room for cake and beverages.

## Activities Included
- Free trampolines (rows and grids)
- Foam pit and airbag for acrobatics
- Ninja warrior obstacle course
- Dodgeball on trampolines
- Basketball dunk zone
- Diving tower

## Address
"Zone d'activité de Vovray, 74000 Annecy" (to be confirmed per the source)

## Opening Hours
"Mercredi, samedi, dimanche et vacances scolaires : journée. Mardi, jeudi, vendredi : fin d'après-midi/soir." Exact times are available on their official website.

## Key Details
- Minimum age: approximately 5 years
- Duration: 1 hour sessions plus ~15 minutes for briefing/equipment
- Online reservation strongly recommended, especially weekends and school holidays
- Free parking available on-site

## Pricing
"Session 1 h ~12-16 €" plus mandatory anti-slip socks at approximately 3€ (reusable). Duo packages, subscriptions, and group rates are available. Children's birthday party packages include one hour of jumping plus a private room for cake and beverages.

## Activities Included
- Free trampolines (rows and grids)
- Foam pit and airbag for acrobatics
- Ninja warrior obstacle course
- Dodgeball on trampolines
- Basketball dunk zone
- Diving tower

## Address
"Zone d'activité de Vovray, 74000 Annecy" (to be confirmed per the source)

## Opening Hours
"Mercredi, samedi, dimanche et vacances scolaires : journée. Mardi, jeudi, vendredi : fin d'après-midi/soir." Exact times are available on their official website.

# Main Categories & Navigation

The site organizes content into **15 activity families**:

**Nature & Outdoor:** Lacs & plages, Bases de loisirs, Cascades & gorges, Points de vue & cols, Sentiers & randonnées, Voies vertes & vélo, Télécabines & trains

**Heritage & Culture:** Châteaux, forts & abbayes, Musées

**Sport & Recreation:** Baignade & nautisme, Sensations & plein air, Sport & jeux, Parcs, jardins & familles, Sorties & détente

# Indoor/Rainy-Day Activities Near Annecy

- `/baignade-nautisme/` — Aquatic centers including "centre aquatique couvert" facilities
- `/sport-jeux/` — Features "Le Bowl Bowling Annecy" (16 lanes), indoor skating rink, and climbing gyms

entries.toolResultText:
# La Turbine Sciences — Pricing, Hours & Activities

## Ticket Pricing
- **Adult:** "5,50 €"
- **Children under 18 & reduced:** "3 €"
- **Under 6 years:** Free
- **Group visits:** "60 €" per session, or "100 € pour 2 visites/jour"

## Opening Hours
"Mar-dim 14h-18h · fermé les jours fériés" (Tuesday–Sunday, 2–6 PM; closed Mondays and holidays). Group visits available Tuesday–Friday at 9 or 10:30 AM by reservation.

## Address
"Place Chorus / 3 rue des Tisserands, 74960 Annecy (Cran-Gevrier)"

## Activities for Families
The center offers:
- Interactive exhibitions featuring manipulative displays on climate, energy, and science topics
- A digital planetarium with immersive shows (ages 6+)
- Hands-on workshops during school holidays
- Scientific lectures and outdoor nature excursions
- "Gratuit pour les moins de 6 ans" (free entry for under-6s makes it budget-friendly)

Plan to spend 1–2 hours, or a half-day including planetarium and workshops. The facility is fully accessible for people with reduced mobility.

# Le Bowl Bowling Annecy - Key Details

**Pricing:**
- Adult: €8 per game
- Child: €6 per game
- Family packages available for evening outings
- Shoe rental pricing: Not specified

**Address:**
"9 boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy"

**Opening Hours:**
- Monday-Thursday: 2 PM–1 AM
- Friday-Saturday: 2 PM–4 AM
- Sunday: 2 PM–midnight

**Family Details:**
- 16 bowling lanes
- Integrated restaurant/brasserie (open lunch and dinner)
- Nightclub (Friday-Saturday, 11 PM–4 AM)
- Children's birthday packages available (1 hour + beverages)
- Sunday tournament with on-site registration
- Free parking on-site
- Partially wheelchair accessible (ground floor entry, adapted parking, accessible restrooms not available)
- No animals permitted

**Contact:** +33 (0)4 50 22 19 06 or [lac-annecy.com](https://www.lac-annecy.com/)

# Bam Freesports Annecy Pricing & Info

## Pricing
"Session 1 h ~12-16 €" plus mandatory anti-slip socks at approximately 3€ (reusable). Duo packages, subscriptions, and group rates are available. Children's birthday party packages include one hour of jumping plus a private room for cake and beverages.

## Activities Included
- Free trampolines (rows and grids)
- Foam pit and airbag for acrobatics
- Ninja warrior obstacle course
- Dodgeball on trampolines
- Basketball dunk zone
- Diving tower

## Address
"Zone d'activité de Vovray, 74000 Annecy" (to be confirmed per the source)

## Opening Hours
"Mercredi, samedi, dimanche et vacances scolaires : journée. Mardi, jeudi, vendredi : fin d'après-midi/soir." Exact times are available on their official website.

## Key Details
- Minimum age: approximately 5 years
- Duration: 1 hour sessions plus ~15 minutes for briefing/equipment
- Online reservation strongly recommended, especially weekends and school holidays
- Free parking available on-site
